events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Guitar God
angles.copy: Happy 79th birthday to the iconic Brian May! What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones' frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Ageless Rocker
angles.copy: 83 years young and still moving like Jagger! Happy birthday to the one and only Sir Mick Jagger. What's your go-to Stones track?

events.title: MTV turns 45
events.blurb: Music Television (MTV) launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first video.

angles.name: Video Killed The Radio Star
angles.copy: 45 years ago today, MTV launched and changed music forever! Remember The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star'? What was the first music video that blew your mind?

events.title: Oasis' 'Definitely Maybe' turns 32
events.blurb: Oasis released their iconic debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994.

angles.name: Debut Album Anniversary
angles.copy: 32 years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. Which track still gets you singing along the loudest?

events.title: Woodstock Festival's 57th anniversary
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair took place from August 15-18, 1969, in Bethel, New York.

angles.name: Peace & Music
angles.copy: 57 years ago, half a million people gathered for '3 Days of Peace & Music' at Woodstock. What's the one performance you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: 49 years since Elvis Presley's passing
events.blurb: The King of Rock and Roll, Elvis Presley, passed away on August 16, 1977.

angles.name: Remembering The King
angles.copy: On this day, we remember the King, Elvis Presley, 49 years after his passing. His music continues to inspire generations. What's your favourite Elvis track?

events.title: 30 years since Tupac Shakur's passing
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur passed away on September 13, 1996, six days after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac's Legacy
angles.copy: 30 years ago, we lost a true icon. Remembering Tupac Shakur and his unparalleled impact on music and culture. What's your favourite Tupac lyric?

events.title: 56 years since Jimi Hendrix's passing
events.blurb: Guitar legend Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970.

angles.name: Remembering Hendrix
angles.copy: Today marks 56 years since we lost the revolutionary Jimi Hendrix. His guitar work still sounds as fresh and groundbreaking as ever. What's your favourite Hendrix track?

events.title: The Beatles' 'Abbey Road' turns 57
events.blurb: The Beatles released their iconic album 'Abbey Road' in the UK on September 26, 1969.

angles.name: Abbey Road Anniversary
angles.copy: 57 years since The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That cover, those songs... pure magic. What's your favourite moment on the album?

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: The Pretenders' lead singer Chrissie Hynde was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Pretenders Icon
angles.copy: Happy 75th birthday to the legendary Chrissie Hynde! Her voice and attitude are as powerful as ever. What's your favourite Pretenders song?

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Rock 'n' Roll Star
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the swagger and the tunes. What's your favourite Liam moment?

events.title: John Lennon's 'Imagine' turns 55
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic single 'Imagine' was released in the US on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine Peace
angles.copy: 55 years since John Lennon released the timeless anthem 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates as strongly as ever. What does this song mean to you?

events.title: The first iPod turns 25
events.blurb: Apple unveiled the original iPod on October 23, 2001, revolutionising portable music.

angles.name: Pocket Full of Music
angles.copy: Can you believe it's 25 years since the first iPod was unveiled? '1,000 songs in your pocket' felt like magic! What was on your first iPod playlist?

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th is celebrated annually as James Bond Day, marking the release date of the first 007 film, Dr. No, in 1962.

angles.name: Shaken, Not Stirred
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Time to celebrate 007's enduring legacy. Who's your favourite Bond, and what's the ultimate Bond theme tune?

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: Legendary Beatles co-founder John Lennon was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: Remembering John Lennon
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the visionary John Lennon. His music and message continue to inspire millions worldwide.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: The celebrated British actor and comedian John Cleese was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: Comedy Legend
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 87th birthday to the brilliant John Cleese! From Monty Python to Fawlty Towers, he's given us so many laughs. What's your favourite John Cleese moment?
